'''√m-d-ch''' ('''madacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:peonize|peonize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:peonize|peonize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √m-d-ch
|-
! Lemma
| madacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:madachithi|madachithi]] || [[word:madachiji|madachiji]] || [[word:madachishi|madachishi]] || [[word:madachi|madachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:madachuthuth|madachuthuth]] || [[word:madachujuj|madachujuj]] || [[word:madachushush|madachushush]] || [[word:madach|madach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:madachuthu|madachuthu]] || [[word:madachuju|madachuju]] || [[word:madachushu|madachushu]] || [[word:madachu|madachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:madachufuth|madachufuth]] || [[word:madachufuj|madachufuj]] || [[word:madachufush|madachufush]] || [[word:madachuf|madachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:madachethe|madachethe]] || [[word:madacheje|madacheje]] || [[word:madacheshe|madacheshe]] || [[word:madache|madache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:madachothoth|madachothoth]] || [[word:madachojoj|madachojoj]] || [[word:madachoshosh|madachoshosh]] || [[word:madach|madach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:madachotho|madachotho]] || [[word:madachojo|madachojo]] || [[word:madachosho|madachosho]] || [[word:madacho|madacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:madachofoth|madachofoth]] || [[word:madachofoj|madachofoj]] || [[word:madachofosh|madachofosh]] || [[word:madachof|madachof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:madachïfïf|madachïfïf]] || [[word:madachïfïf|madachïfïf]] || [[word:madachïfïf|madachïfïf]] || [[word:madachïfïf|madachïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]] || [[word:madachïf|madachïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:madachæthæ|madachæthæ]] || [[word:madachæjæ|madachæjæ]] || [[word:madachæshæ|madachæshæ]] || [[word:madachæ|madachæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:madachathath|madachathath]] || [[word:madachajaj|madachajaj]] || [[word:madachashash|madachashash]] || [[word:madach|madach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:madachatha|madachatha]] || [[word:madachaja|madachaja]] || [[word:madachasha|madachasha]] || [[word:madacha|madacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:madachafath|madachafath]] || [[word:madachafaj|madachafaj]] || [[word:madachafash|madachafash]] || [[word:madachaf|madachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:madachasha|madachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomadachasha|gomadachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimadachasha|gokimadachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:madachnüsha|madachnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomadachnknüsha|gomadachnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimadachnüsha|gokimadachnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:madachshësha|madachshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomadachnkshësha|gomadachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimadachshësha|gokimadachshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:madachrosha|madachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadachnkrosha|gomadachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadachrosha|gokimadachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:madachmusha|madachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadachnkmusha|gomadachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadachmusha|gokimadachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:madachsherasha|madachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomadachnksherasha|gomadachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimadachsherasha|gokimadachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:madachngasha|madachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomadachnkngasha|gomadachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimadachngasha|gokimadachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:madachyasha|madachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomadachnkyasha|gomadachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimadachyasha|gokimadachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:madachyamasha|madachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomadachnkyamasha|gomadachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimadachyamasha|gokimadachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:madachnüshësha|madachnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomadachnknüshësha|gomadachnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimadachnüshësha|gokimadachnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:madachnürosha|madachnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadachnknürosha|gomadachnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadachnürosha|gokimadachnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madachnümusha|madachnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadachnknümusha|gomadachnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadachnümusha|gokimadachnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:madachshënüsha|madachshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomadachnkshënüsha|gomadachnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimadachshënüsha|gokimadachshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:madachshërosha|madachshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadachnkshërosha|gomadachnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadachshërosha|gokimadachshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madachshëmusha|madachshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadachnkshëmusha|gomadachnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadachshëmusha|gokimadachshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:madachronüsha|madachronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomadachnkronüsha|gomadachnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimadachronüsha|gokimadachronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:madachroshësha|madachroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomadachnkroshësha|gomadachnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimadachroshësha|gokimadachroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madachromusha|madachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadachnkromusha|gomadachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadachromusha|gokimadachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:madachmunüsha|madachmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomadachnkmunüsha|gomadachnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimadachmunüsha|gokimadachmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:madachmushësha|madachmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomadachnkmushësha|gomadachnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimadachmushësha|gokimadachmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:madachmurosha|madachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomadachnkmurosha|gomadachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimadachmurosha|gokimadachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:madach|madach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mædæch|mædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homadach|homadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homædæch|homædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomadach|hohomadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomædæch|hohomædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nümadach|nümadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nümædæch|nümædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünümadach|nünümadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünümædæch|nünümædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïmadach|nïmadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïmædæch|nïmædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïmadach|nïnïmadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïmædæch|nïnïmædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumadach|lumadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumædæch|lumædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumadach|lulumadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumædæch|lulumædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limadach|limadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limædæch|limædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimadach|lilimadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimædæch|lilimædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komadach|komadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komædæch|komædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomadach|kokomadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomædæch|kokomædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemadach|kemadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemædæch|kemædæch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemadach|kekemadach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemædæch|kekemædæch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
